str.authority: New Zealand Police Financial Intelligence Unit (NZFIU)
str.notes: Suspicious Activity Reports must be filed within 3 working days of forming suspicion. VASPs registered with DIA are reporting entities under the Anti-Money Laundering and Countering Financing of Terrorism Act 2009. Filed via NZFIU's goAML portal.

ctr.authority: New Zealand Police Financial Intelligence Unit (NZFIU)
ctr.notes: Prescribed Transaction Reports (PTR) required for physical cash transactions of NZD 10,000 or more. Must be filed within 10 working days.
